title: Calycomelia quadrangulata
intro:
There is no information available on the plant Calycomelia quadrangulata.

However, I can suggest that you might be referring to another plant. Calycophyllum quadrangulare is a plant species known as the "Brazilian rosewood". 

Brazilian rosewood is a plant species known as a woody vine or tree. The health benefits of Brazilian rosewood include its potential to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties.

Bioactive constituents of Brazilian rosewood include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds.

The most common herbal preparations made with Brazilian rosewood include extracts and oils, which are used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
